title: Let Chorus Grow!
description: Remove the limits for your chorus trees, and let them grow infinitely!
body:
Why limit the growth of your planted chorus fruit, if you don't have to? Let your planted chorus trees grow as much as they want! But be careful when breaking them, because the amount of items may affect your performance heavily.

This mod doesn't change the growth speed of the chorus plants in any way, it only allows them to grow up to huge sizes, so you'll have to wait to have them this big.

![Chorus tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c2041dbd0ee9005707fb98ec1faea94e27e903a_0.webp)
